_doc: Project-scoped Claude Code settings for lerobot-bench. See .claude/agents/ for the team. Hooks below: (1) auto-format Python files after Edit/Write, (2) gate `git push` behind `make all`, (3) block writes to generated artifacts, (4) print branch + uncommitted-files status on Stop.

hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|;|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]+push'; then make -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" all >&2 || { echo 'Refusing git push: "make all" failed. Fix the cause; do not bypass.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */results/*|*.parquet|*.mp4|*.webm|*.mov|*.safetensors|*.ckpt|*.pt|*.pth) echo "Refusing to write $f: generated artifact (results/ goes to HF Hub, weights are inputs)." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" 2>/dev/null && { branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); dirty=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "[lerobot-bench] branch=$branch  uncommitted=$dirty"; } || true
